_comment: Agent-to-agent over DCF: two MCP clients (Claude Code / OpenCode / Claude
Desktop), each launching its own mesh_mcp.py as one end of a pair. Put the
'agent-a' block in agent A's MCP config and 'agent-b' in agent B's. Same
DCF_CHANNEL, distinct DCF_AGENT_NODE_ID, peers pointing at each other.
Local test: both on 127.0.0.1 (below). Over a VPN: replace 127.0.0.1 in
DCF_PEERS with the partner host's Tailscale/WireGuard IP. See AGENT_TO_AGENT.md.
Adjust the args path to wherever this repo lives.
